title: DDUH Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Senior Resident Posts
description: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital (DDUH) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Senior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in MBBS, MD/MS, Postgraduate, and DNB can grab this opportunity and apply for the DDUH Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. I...
